title: Company identity
text: Valliani Jewelers is a fine jewelry retailer founded in 1999 in the California Bay Area by Kash Valliani (Kashif Valliani). The brand is described as a family-owned fine jewelry retail chain and a luxury retail brand in the United States.

Customers can contact Valliani for help with diamond jewelry, engagement rings, wedding bands, lab-grown diamonds, financing, store locations, and general customer support.

title: Online return policy
text: Online purchases have 30-day returns. Returns must include original packaging, certificates, documentation, and any free gifts. Missing items may prevent refund. The online return policy does not change in-store return or exchange rules.

title: Brand background
text: Valliani Jewelers focuses on timeless, accessible jewelry and has helped customers celebrate life moments for over 25 years. Stores are designed to provide a personal, comfortable shopping experience. The company is built on four pillars: Value, Vogue, Verve, and Variety.

title: Privacy Policy Summary
text:
Effective Date: March 28, 2026.

**Overview**
Valliani Jewelers respects customer privacy and protects personal information collected through its website, online services, purchases, and customer interactions.

**Information Collected**
- Customer: name, email, phone, billing and shipping addresses
- Account: username, password, preferences
- Orders: purchase history, saved items, ring size, customer support communications
- Payments: processed securely by third-party PCI-compliant providers; Valliani does not store full payment card details
- Website usage: IP address, browser/device information, website activity, cookies and analytics
- Third-party sources: payment providers, shipping partners, analytics providers, social media platforms

**How Information Is Used**
Process orders, ship products, provide customer support, manage accounts, improve website and services, send important service updates, send marketing offers (where permitted), prevent fraud and security issues, and meet legal and regulatory obligations.

**Data Sharing**
Valliani Jewelers does not sell personal information. Information may be shared only with payment processors, shipping companies, IT and analytics providers, marketing partners (where legally permitted), business affiliates, government or legal authorities when required, and during mergers or business transfers. All service providers are required to protect customer information.

**Cookies**
Cookies keep customers logged in, maintain shopping carts, remember preferences, improve website performance, and support analytics and marketing. Customers can manage cookies through browser settings.

**Data Retention**
Information is kept only as long as necessary. Typical retention: transaction records up to 7 years; marketing information until the customer opts out; analytics data up to 2 years (or anonymized earlier).

**Customer Privacy Rights**
Depending on applicable laws, customers may access, correct, delete, restrict, or object to processing of their personal information, and request a copy (data portability). Identity verification may be required.

**Security**
Valliani uses administrative, technical, and physical safeguards. No online system can guarantee complete security.

**Children's Privacy**
Services are intended for adults. No intentional collection from children under 13; such data will be deleted if identified.

**International Users**
Information may be transferred to and processed in the United States when customers access services from outside the U.S.

**California Privacy Rights (CCPA/CPRA)**
California residents may request information collected, corrections, deletion, access, and opt-out of sale or sharing. Valliani Jewelers does not sell personal information.

**Policy Updates**
The Privacy Policy may be updated periodically. Changes are published with a revised effective date.

metadata.answer_policy: Answer using this privacy policy summary only; do not invent additional privacy terms.

title: Payment methods and financing surcharges
text:
Valliani Jewelers in-store Payment Method options (Price Calculator / POS pricing):

**Cash** — no surcharge (0%).
**Credit Card** — 3.5% surcharge.
**Lease / specialty financing providers** — Progressive, Acima, UOwn, and Kefene — 5% surcharge.
**Affirm** — 12% surcharge.

These percentages are added on top of the cash/manager price when quoting a financed or card total. Cash is the base price with no payment fee.

**Separately — "Financing" no-interest installment plans** (when payment type is Financing and a term is chosen):
- 6 months no interest — 3.5%
- 12 months no interest — 7%
- 18 months no interest — 12%
- 24 months no interest — 18%
- 36 months no interest — 22%
- 48 months no interest — 28%
- 60 months no interest — 32%

Quick answers for the boss: Affirm is the highest card/lease-style fee at 12%. Progressive/Acima/UOwn/Kefene are 5%. Credit card is 3.5%. Cash has no fee.

metadata.source_file: Price Calculator Payment Method UI + pricing.ts
metadata.freshness: aligned with in-app Price Calculator payment fees
metadata.answer_policy: Answer with these exact surcharge percents. Do not invent other lenders or rates. Clarify cash = 0% fee. If asked which is cheapest card/financing path among listed options: Progressive/Acima/UOwn/Kefene at 5% beat Affirm at 12%; credit card is 3.5%; cash is 0%.
